---
title: "White Ribbon"
description: "Essays on state craft and citizenship"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/en/">
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://white-ribbon.net/en/">
---

::: {.language-gate}
# White Ribbon

[English](/en/) · [Русский](/ru/) · [Беларуская](/be/)
:::
